item.title: Forging Square Metal Tubing by Hand
item.description: Blacksmithing process shaping heated metal into square tubing. Demonstrates precise forging, forming, and finishing techniques to create strong structural components.

media:content.media:title: Forging Square Metal Tubing by Hand
media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing process shaping heated metal into square tubing. Demonstrates precise forging, forming, and finishing techniques to create strong structural components.

item.title: Chevron vs Wheat Twist by Black Bear Forge
item.description: A clear comparison of chevron and wheat twist forging techniques by Black Bear Forge, highlighting pattern detail, process, and craftsmanship in metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Chevron vs Wheat Twist by Black Bear Forge
media:content.media:description: A clear comparison of chevron and wheat twist forging techniques by Black Bear Forge, highlighting pattern detail, process, and craftsmanship in metalwork.

item.title: Twisting Square Tubing at Black Bear Forge
item.description: Watch Black Bear Forge demonstrate the process of twisting square metal tubing, showcasing precision, technique, and craftsmanship in metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Twisting Square Tubing at Black Bear Forge
media:content.media:description: Watch Black Bear Forge demonstrate the process of twisting square metal tubing, showcasing precision, technique, and craftsmanship in metalwork.

item.title: Creativity on a Shoestring Budget
item.description: Discover practical tips and techniques to create impressive projects and crafts without spending a lot, proving creativity thrives on a shoestring budget.

media:content.media:title: Creativity on a Shoestring Budget
media:content.media:description: Discover practical tips and techniques to create impressive projects and crafts without spending a lot, proving creativity thrives on a shoestring budget.

item.title: Reverse Twist Forging
item.description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates a satisfying method for forging a reverse twist.

media:content.media:title: Reverse Twist Forging
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates a satisfying method for forging a reverse twist.

item.title: Pineapple Twist Technique
item.description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates ornamental blacksmithing with a step-by-step look at the pineapple twist technique.

media:content.media:title: Pineapple Twist Technique
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates ornamental blacksmithing with a step-by-step look at the pineapple twist technique.

item.title: Black Bear Forge: Forging Square Tubing
item.description: Black Bear Forge shares a practical approach to forging square tubing in this workshop video.

media:content.media:title: Black Bear Forge: Forging Square Tubing
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shares a practical approach to forging square tubing in this workshop video.

item.title: Forge vibes with Black Bear Forge
item.description: Black Bear Forge shares a forge-focused video with a strong workshop atmosphere.

media:content.media:title: Forge vibes with Black Bear Forge
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shares a forge-focused video with a strong workshop atmosphere.

item.title: Build a Better Forge
item.description: Black Bear Forge shares a simple guide to building a better forge by yourself.

media:content.media:title: Build a Better Forge
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shares a simple guide to building a better forge by yourself.
